ideas.concept: Merchant precision high-voltage DC power modules (50-300 kV, ppm-class stability, arc-tolerant fast-recovery) for electron-beam, ion-implant, and X-ray source OEMs
named_buyer_examples: Implanter/e-beam tool OEMs (Axcelis/Wolfspeed SiC expansion context, L06-041)
X-ray/NDT source makers (Varex-class, L05-033)
CGN Dasheng-class CN accelerator builders (L05-035/038, big-science/industrial route)
ideas.painful_job: Every electron-beam, implanter, and X-ray source needs stiff, ppm-stable HV with graceful arc recovery; the merchant base is effectively one dominant vendor (Spellman, judgment; P4 pre-promotion competitor map required) plus in-house builds, and SiC-implant demand (L06-041) and cargo/NDT source growth (L05-033) are stressing supply while HV qualification still leans on generic IEC 60060 practice (L05-043).
ideas.product: A modular HV platform: oil-free solid-state multipliers with active ripple cancellation, arc-quench and <10 ms recovery, integrated HV telemetry, 50-300 kV / 10-100 kW classes with a published acceptance protocol; sold as OEM modules and lab supplies.
ideas.frontier_vision: The default precision-HV layer for the beam economy - implanters, sterilization, imaging, scientific sources - with telemetry-driven predictive maintenance across fleets.
ideas.precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 100 kV/10 kW prototype with ripple/arc-recovery characterization; 2028 two PAID OEM evaluations (one US tool OEM, one accelerator lab) - BINDING; 2029 reliability database + acceptance-protocol publication; CN chapter REDUCED pending evidence (no eligible source shows CN accelerator OEMs outsourcing precision HV): name a CN OEM/tender channel in P4 or the CN chapter becomes license notes; CN channel scoped via big-science procurement and non-controlled application counsel.
ideas.launch_2030_timing_thesis: SiC implant capacity, EtO-replacement e-beam, and cargo scanning all expand through 2030-2034 on a merchant HV base that has consolidated rather than grown; a qualified second source lands into real procurement friction.
ideas.demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: SiC fab equipment cycles (L06-041) and cargo-scanning upgrade programs (Varex order growth, L05-033); CN: CGN Dasheng accelerator capacity additions per municipal EIA cadence (L05-038) and CN medical/industrial accelerator localization tenders (L05-036 pattern).
ideas.competition_outlook_2030: Spellman (dominant, will defend) AND Advanced Energy (HiTek/UltraVolt), AMETEK/Glassman, Matsusada, iseg, Heinzinger, Technix, XP Power/Excelitas lines, CN Dongwen-class HV makers scaling - P4 competitor map is a PRE-PROMOTION requirement: the 'effectively one dominant vendor' thesis is held only as judgment and must survive it, or the seed collapses to niche lab supply; pre-agreed fold-down: the DC-HV line folds into C-09's platform family if OEM appetite fails. Wedge must be arc-recovery + telemetry, not price.
ideas.timing_window_risk: Incumbent breadth is formidable; if Spellman's lead survives untouched, this collapses to a niche lab-supply business.
ideas.commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if no OEM design-in by end-2032)
ideas.extreme_edge: Arc events as data: HV modules that log and learn from every discharge across the installed base.
ideas.first_experiment: 100 kV/10 kW module: demonstrate <10 ppm ripple, arc-quench with <10 ms full-spec recovery, 1,000 h burn-in telemetry (2027-28).
ideas.founder_fit_note: Active ripple cancellation, arc-quench control, and HV telemetry draw on founder circuits and controls skills, but 50-300 kV insulation design and high-voltage packaging craft sit largely outside the profile.
ideas.fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: P4 competitor map made a pre-promotion requirement (Spellman AND Advanced Energy HiTek/UltraVolt, AMETEK/Glassman, Matsusada, iseg, Heinzinger, Technix, XP Power, CN HV makers); two paid OEM evaluations by 2028 made binding; CN chapter reduced pending evidence (name a CN OEM/tender channel in P4 or it becomes license notes); fold-down of the DC-HV line into C-09's platform family pre-agreed if OEM appetite fails.
ideas.adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N4/E5/C6/V5/T5): thesis rests on a competitive claim held only as judgment; highest hidden-commodity risk among surviving F seeds; CN leg reduced pending evidence - counted dual-conditional in quota.

ideas.concept: Second-source vacuum variable capacitors and fast RF tuning components (the Comet-monopoly layer) for RF matching networks, US + CN generator ecosystems
named_buyer_examples: US/EU matchbox and generator makers seeking supply diversification
Hengyunchang/Injet-class CN generator makers (component localization <12%, L06-054)
ideas.painful_job: Vacuum variable capacitors - the tuning heart of every RF matchbox - are supplied by an effective near-monopoly (Comet, with 23.8% single-customer concentration risk on its own side, L05-034); CN generator entrants localize systems but import the capacitor layer (L06-054), and US OEMs carry single-source exposure on a precision vacuum-brazed component.
ideas.product: A qualified vacuum variable capacitor line (10-2,000 pF, 5-30 kV classes) plus fast solid-state tuning elements, manufactured with modern brazing/bellows automation; dual-channel: merchant sales to US/EU OEMs and licensed assembly for CN mature-node ecosystems.
ideas.frontier_vision: Own the tuning-component layer beneath both incumbent and solid-state matching eras (bridge product to F-01), the way passives giants own their categories.
ideas.precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 process development (ceramic-metal brazing, bellows) with a vacuum-components partner - BINDING 2027 GATE: signed manufacturing-partner route (precision brazing/bellows craft is both moat and barrier; the $450k experiment does not make a qualified line); 2028 first capacitor family qualified against Comet datasheet specs; 2029 one PAID OEM qualification (gate); P4: map existing CN vacuum-capacitor makers (credible domestic caps collapse the CN licensing leg) and verify the Comet/Jennings supply structure; portfolio pre-agreement: if F-01 and F-22 both survive P4, merge into one RF-components company (two L06 RF-chain startups is one too many); CN licensing scoped with export counsel.
ideas.launch_2030_timing_thesis: Supply-chain diversification pressure (both decoupling directions) peaks as CN generator volume grows and US OEMs de-risk; a qualified second source lands into procurement policy, not just price competition.
ideas.demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: OEM dual-sourcing mandates as RF platform ramps mature (L06-039/040); CN: component-localization programs targeting the <12% RF-component gap (L06-054) under the 15th/16th FYP cycles.
ideas.competition_outlook_2030: Comet (defending its core), Jennings legacy lines, CN startups attacking the same gap - a manufacturing-execution race; margins thin if it becomes pure import substitution.
ideas.timing_window_risk: Precision vacuum manufacturing is capital- and craft-intensive; if F-01-style solid-state matching wins fast, the vacuum-cap market itself shrinks - hence the dual-track with solid-state tuning elements.
ideas.commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if qualification lags Comet-equivalent specs by end-2030)
ideas.extreme_edge: One company supplying both the legacy tuning element and its solid-state replacement, controlling the transition timeline.
ideas.first_experiment: Fabricate and life-test a 12 kV/1,000 pF vacuum variable capacitor against incumbent datasheet limits (Q, current, cycle life) with third-party witness (2028).
ideas.founder_fit_note: Low direct fit: vacuum variable capacitors are a precision brazing/bellows manufacturing product, with founder skills applying mainly to RF characterization and acceptance-test instrumentation.
ideas.fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: vacuum-components manufacturing-partner route made a binding 2027 gate; one paid OEM qualification by 2029 added; P4 must map existing CN vacuum-capacitor makers (credible domestic caps collapse the CN licensing leg) and verify the Comet/Jennings supply structure; portfolio pre-agreement added - if F-01 and F-22 both survive P4, merge into one RF-components company.
ideas.adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N5/E5/C6/V5/T6): single-source arbitrage (Comet 23.8% single-customer concentration, L05-034) with a sensible solid-state dual-track hedge bridging to F-01; craft barrier cuts both ways - manufacturing-partner route gated.

ideas.concept: PEM electrolyzer 'protective operating envelope' controllers with warranty-grade black-box logging: embedded plant hardware that shapes current/OCV stress and produces bankable degradation evidence
named_buyer_examples: US H2Hub project developers/financiers (L11-032)
PEM OEM deployments (Plug GenEco sites, L11-046)
CN park operators post-Kuqa (L11-049) via OEM design-in (LONGi/Peric channel)
ideas.painful_job: PEM warranties are written before the industry knows which stress (OCV rests, ripple amplitude, ramp rates) drives which degradation mode (L11-001/003/004/031); financiers price that ignorance into project debt (H2Hubs, L11-032) and Chinese parks demonstrably underperform under renewable-following operation (Kuqa, L11-049) - nobody sells hardware that both limits stress and proves compliance.
ideas.product: An embedded controller between plant control and stack: enforces manufacturer-agnostic protective envelopes (ramp shaping, OCV-rest management, ripple guards), logs tamper-evident stress histories, and issues warranty-compliance certificates; sold to OEMs and project financiers as the 'flight recorder + envelope protection' of stacks. Distinct from C-22 (offline degradation-truth benches) - this is the always-on plant device.
ideas.frontier_vision: Bankability hardware for electrochemical assets: every stack, battery, and fuel cell ships with an envelope-and-evidence layer that converts degradation science into financeable warranties.
ideas.precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-27 codify published stress-degradation maps into envelope algorithms; 2028 bench validation on a short stack with accelerated stress tests; BINDING 2029 GATE: one named H2Hub lender/financier technical requirement or a developer LOI referencing instrumented warranty evidence, PLUS one OEM design-in agreement (the demand mechanism is anticipatory - developers buy only if lenders force it); data-interface pre-agreement with C-22 (its benches calibrate the envelope maps this device enforces - no duplicate bench build); battery/fuel-cell warranty retarget hedge SCOPED (not asserted) by 2029.
ideas.launch_2030_timing_thesis: H2Hub Phase-2 construction and CN park retrofits both mature 2030-2033 with degradation warranties as the documented financing friction; the device is cheap relative to stack replacement risk.
ideas.demand_trigger_2030_2034: US: H2Hubs Phase 2 disbursement-to-construction transitions (L11-032) forcing lender technical requirements; CN: utilization audits at Kuqa-class parks and multi-set procurement rounds adding lifetime guarantees (L11-049/050/051).
ideas.competition_outlook_2030: Stack OEM in-house BMS-equivalents (Plug/Siemens/LONGi), plant-DCS vendors, C-22-class test companies extending into monitoring; feature-absorption is the main threat - the notarized evidence layer for financiers is the defensible part.
ideas.timing_window_risk: If hydrogen FIDs stay depressed (documented order-book contraction), volume never arrives; the device concept then retargets battery/fuel-cell assets (same physics of warranty).
ideas.commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034 (kill if no OEM/financier adoption commitment by end-2032)
ideas.extreme_edge: Cross-fleet degradation actuarial tables - the Underwriters Laboratory of electrochemical asset life.
ideas.first_experiment: Short-stack A/B test: envelope-protected versus naive renewable-following profiles over 2,000 h, demonstrating measurable degradation-rate reduction and audit-grade logging (2028). BINDING: the A/B result must show a measurable degradation-rate reduction - the product's existence proof.
ideas.founder_fit_note: Strong transfer: the embedded envelope-enforcement controller, ramp/ripple stress shaping, and tamper-evident logging are founder embedded-systems, controls, and data-acquisition work, with stack electrochemistry degradation models as the main outside dependency.
ideas.fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R2 FIX applied: binding 2029 gate added (one named H2Hub lender/financier technical requirement or developer LOI referencing instrumented warranty evidence, plus one OEM design-in agreement); 2,000 h A/B experiment made the binding existence proof (measurable degradation-rate reduction); data-interface pre-agreement with C-22 (no duplicate bench build); battery/fuel-cell warranty retarget hedge scoped (not asserted) by 2029.
ideas.adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R2 adjudication (FIX, N6/E7/C7/V7/T6): most intelligent new L11 seed - converts published stress-degradation science into bankability hardware with genuinely independent US (H2Hub lender exposure) and CN (Kuqa-class utilization audits) legs; demand mechanism is anticipatory - gated on lender forcing.

ideas.concept: Closed-loop UHV chamber conditioning and acceptance-certification systems for China's big-science vacuum supply chain: instrumented vacuum-firing/bakeout stations with measured hydrogen-outgassing endpoints, integrated rate-of-rise/leak/RGA acceptance metrology, and tamper-evident per-chamber certification - sold as equipment plus recurring calibration to the China-registered fabricators who alone may bid HEPS/CEPC-class chamber tenders.
named_buyer_examples: IHEP/CAS (HEPS storage-ring chamber tenders, China-registered-manufacturer-only rule - L07-045)
ASIPP/CAS (fusion facility procurement cadence - L01-037, L01-038)
China-registered vacuum-chamber fabricators qualified under IHEP tender rules (specific firms to be named in P4 from tender-award records)
ideas.painful_job: Every UHV chamber delivered to a Chinese big-science facility must clear hydrogen-outgassing and leak acceptance; the only validated route is a rigid, energy-intensive fixed recipe (250C/30h for >70,000x H2 reduction - L07-009; material dependence L07-008), run open-loop with negotiated per-project acceptance. Tender rules restrict bidding to China-registered manufacturers that are themselves the manufacturer of the offered product (L07-045; PRC-registration + manufacturer eligibility clause independently verified in the primary tender document at ccnta.cn on 2026-07-13 - ledger claim_supported repair assigned to the orchestrator), so domestic fabricators must build this process-and-metrology capability themselves. Market-structure context only, no import-constraint claim: INFICON FY2025 regional sales (Americas -12.4% to $156.4M; Asia-Pacific +19.2% to $168.6M - L07-053) show a mid-scale, regionally shifting metrology market, and APAC growth evidences CONTINUED import availability - the wedge is the tender rule plus the fabricators' process-capability gap, not a metrology import barrier.
ideas.product: A conditioning-and-acceptance island: (1) instrumented bakeout/vacuum-firing station with model-based hydrogen-depletion endpoint control that replaces the fixed 250C/30h recipe with a measured stop criterion; (2) integrated outgassing-rate (throughput and rate-of-rise), helium-leak, and RGA cleanliness metrology traceable to witness standards; (3) certification software producing per-chamber signed acceptance dossiers matching facility specs. Founder-controlled: endpoint models, calibrated reference standards, certification format. JV/licensed CN entity builds the furnace hardware.
ideas.frontier_vision: The 'certified vacuum outcome' layer for everyone who builds UHV/XHV hardware - accelerators, fusion, quantum cryostat supply chains, semiconductor chamber fabricators - where chambers ship with measured outgassing datasheets the way steel ships with mill certs; extreme end extends toward XHV acceptance (L07-002, L07-001).
ideas.precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: publish hydrogen-depletion endpoint model and bench validation against the L07-009 benchmark; build instrumented bakeout bench ($300k decisive experiment). 2028: cooperative-agreement validation with one non-CN accelerator lab to establish credibility (complementary to, not competing with, the surviving A-05 US surface-engineering line); begin CN channel scouting and HK/CN licensed-entity design; freeze IP split (models/metrology retained, furnace hardware licensed); BINDING 2028 evidence gate: document that CN facilities impose vacuum-acceptance requirements on fabricators at delivery (tender technical annex, facility vacuum-acceptance spec, or fabricator quality requirement) - the buyer-existence proof that fabricators, not institutes, own conditioning/acceptance; no 2029 paid pilot without it. 2029: paid pilot with one China-registered chamber fabricator. BINDING P4 pre-promotion condition: re-date the 2021-vintage L07-045 anchor AND evidence >=2 additional CN chamber-class tenders (HEPS follow-on/CSNS/ASIPP-pattern) to establish multi-tender procurement cadence beyond CEPC; name a NIM-class CN metrology anchor for witness-standard traceability.
ideas.launch_2030_timing_thesis: Window opens, not closes, at 2030: China-manufacturer-only tender rules (L07-045, eligibility clause verified in the primary document) mean domestic fabricators need certified process capability exactly as the largest CN vacuum procurement wave (CEPC-class) is decided; the craft is process-and-metrology, which incumbent furnace makers and instrument vendors have not packaged, and which does not commoditize by 2030 because no volume market exists yet to attract them.
ideas.demand_trigger_2030_2034: NAMED TRIGGER: CEPC construction approval under China's 15th Five-Year Plan - IHEP is already running CEPC-specific high-efficiency klystron prototypes (L05-012, L05-013), evidencing a funded pre-construction program; approval converts to ~100 km of storage-ring/booster vacuum sections procured under China-registered-manufacturer rules through the 2030s. Secondary named cadence: HEPS-pattern follow-on/upgrade tenders (L07-045) and ASIPP fusion power/vacuum upgrade tenders (L01-037, L01-038 pattern).
ideas.competition_outlook_2030: SAES Getters (coating incumbent, IT - L07-037) constrained by the localization rule; INFICON-class Western metrology vendors sell gauges, not conditioning process control or certification dossiers (L07-053 retained as market-structure context only - imports remain available, APAC sales +19.2% FY2025); domestic furnace makers selling heat without certified vacuum outcomes; institute in-house benches (IHEP/ASIPP build their own, do not productize); component houses (Kurt J. Lesker-class catalogs, L07-036) sell parts not process. Main 2030 threat: a large CN fabricator internalizing the bench and a CAS institute publishing a free reference recipe.
ideas.timing_window_risk: CEPC slip is the dominant risk (single lumpy anchor - the exact defect that killed B-12); mitigated by multi-facility cadence (HEPS upgrades, ASIPP, CSNS-class - BINDING P4 pre-promotion condition: >=2 additional chamber-class tenders evidenced, else no promotion) and by equipment+calibration economics that work at fabricator level, not only facility level. Access risk: foreign founder cannot bid tenders directly - sells equipment/certification to eligible fabricators via licensed CN entity; margins mid; IP risk is bench absorption, countered by calibrated reference standards and model updates rather than a one-time transferable recipe.
ideas.commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034-12-31; interim kill: no paid CN fabricator pilot by end-2029, or CEPC not approved AND no non-CEPC CN facility-driven order by end-2032.
ideas.extreme_edge: XHV-regime acceptance (below 1e-10 Pa) where gauge physics itself is unresolved (L07-002) - a research-grade upsell to national labs.
ideas.first_experiment: 2027-Q4: instrumented bakeout bench on 316L witness chambers - demonstrate measured-endpoint control reproducing the >70,000x H2 outgassing reduction benchmark (L07-009) with >=30% cycle-time reduction vs the fixed 250C/30h recipe over N=10 runs; in-situ rate-of-rise metrology agreeing with lab-standard throughput measurement within +/-20%.
ideas.founder_fit_note: Model-based bakeout endpoint control, outgassing/RGA acceptance metrology, and certification data systems fit founder controls, instrumentation, and data-acquisition skills, while vacuum-furnace hardware and surface-chemistry process expertise are outside the profile.

gate_results.non_duplication_vs_survivors: Nearest survivor A-05 (US merchant NEG-coating/surface-engineering service; its CN variant B-12 was REJECTED as IP-leaking know-how licensing with CEPC-lumpy demand). G-01 sells NO NEG coating and NO treatment service: it sells conditioning equipment + acceptance metrology + certification to CN fabricators, with the moat in calibrated standards and updating endpoint models rather than a transferable coating recipe, and demand anchored in the tender-rule capability gap rather than SAES substitution.

ideas.adjudication_note: 2026-07-13 R3 adjudication (FIX, N7/E7/C6/V6/T5): genuinely non-obvious conditioning/acceptance-equipment wedge (none of the prior 146 seeds touched it); central tender-rule clause independently verified in the primary document (ccnta.cn); B-12 defects engineered out; timing hinges on CN procurement cadence beyond CEPC and on fabricators (not institutes) owning acceptance.
ideas.fix_applied_notes: 2026-07-13 R3 FIX applied: (1) L07-053 'trade bifurcation constrains Western metrology imports' over-read deleted from painful_job, launch-timing thesis, and competition - INFICON figures retained as market-structure context only (APAC +19.2% FY2025 evidences continued import availability); (2) BINDING 2028 evidence gate added to the plan: documented facility acceptance requirements imposed on fabricators at delivery (buyer-existence proof) preceding the 2029 paid pilot; (3) multi-tender cadence proof beyond CEPC made a BINDING P4 pre-promotion condition (re-date L07-045 AND >=2 additional CN chamber-class tenders, HEPS follow-on/CSNS/ASIPP-pattern); (4) judge's primary-source verification incorporated: PRC-registration + manufacturer eligibility clause confirmed at ccnta.cn 2026-07-13 (L07-045 ledger claim_supported repair assigned to the orchestrator); NIM-class metrology anchor for witness-standard traceability named as P4 task.

ideas.concept: Merchant beam-exit windows, X-ray conversion-target assemblies, and target-interface subsystems - with foil-health monitoring interlocks and certified burst/thermal-margin datasheets - as the qualified consumables layer for China's expanding industrial e-beam/X-ray sterilization fleet and CNNC's centrally procured medical-isotope cyclotron centers.
named_buyer_examples: China Isotope & Radiation Corp / Atom Hi-Tech - centralized self-shielded cyclotron procurement for the named Haikou, Nanyang, Nanchong isotope centers (L05-036)
CGN Dasheng Accelerator Technology - active listed e-beam accelerator manufacturer/operator ecosystem (L05-035; contract figures pending text-extractable re-fetch)
CN sterilization service operators converting from EtO under ISO 11137-1:2025 (L05-042)
ideas.painful_job: Where the beam leaves the vacuum is the machine's most abused interface: thin-foil exit windows and X-ray conversion targets absorb concentrated heat flux, cycle thermally with every run, and take the machine down when they fail - the same interface class documented as 'among the most common issues' in high-power vacuum-electronic devices (L05-014). ISO 11137-1:2025 raised allowable e-beam energy 10->11 MeV and X-ray energy 5->7.5 MeV (L05-042) - a PERMISSIVE change: re-qualification demand arises only where operators choose to uprate for throughput, so uprating adoption is a 2028 evidence gate, not an assumed fleet-wide wave; operators meanwhile remain locked to OEM spares pricing and lead times. In China, an isotope-center network is being centrally procured (L05-036) and each center's cyclotrons consume target foils/windows continuously - with localization pressure against imported spares.
ideas.product: A cross-platform qualified family: (1) Ti-alloy foil exit-window assemblies with engineered cooling frames and statistically certified burst margins; (2) water-cooled Ta/W X-ray conversion-target assemblies for e-beam->X-ray sterilization mode at post-2025 energy limits; (3) cyclotron target-interface hardware (windows, cooling, transfer interfaces); (4) foil-health monitoring (IR temperature + rupture detection with <10 ms vacuum-protection interlock); (5) certified per-lot datasheets and a consumables replacement program. Founder retains foil-bonding/qualification test IP and monitoring electronics; a licensed CN JV manufactures consumables for CN buyers.
ideas.frontier_vision: The merchant 'beam-facing consumables' company for the irradiation economy - windows, converters, targets, and their health instrumentation across sterilization, isotope production, cargo scanning (Varex-class Linatron converters - L05-033), and FLASH-era machines where interface thermal loads only grow (UHDR context L05-023, L05-024).
ideas.precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: failure-mode and patent map of window/target art; build 60 kW-class window/target test cell; decisive experiment ($350k). 2028: binding gate - one co-development/evaluation agreement with a named operator or OEM rebuild channel (CN side via licensed entity; US side via a sterilization contractor or ARDAP-ecosystem partner, L05-031); certified datasheet library started; P4-style verification of the CN medical-isotope plan primary text and re-extraction of L05-035/L05-028 figures; second BINDING 2028 evidence gate: named operators/OEMs actually uprating to 11 MeV/7.5 MeV under ISO 11137-1:2025 (else the ISO trigger de-weights to CN consumables + localization demand only); beam-time validation of radiation-driven foil degradation (embrittlement, blistering) via the co-development partner - the surrogate-flux experiment does not cover it. 2029: paid qualification order for spares on one installed machine class; contractualized JV IP split before any CN manufacturing.
ideas.launch_2030_timing_thesis: 2030 lands after early operators uprating to the permissive ISO 11137-1:2025 energy limits have created demand for third-party qualified assemblies but before OEM spares chains have re-tooled to the new limits - contingent on uprating adoption (2028 evidence gate: named uprating operators/OEMs, else the ISO trigger de-weights to CN consumables + localization demand only); in CN, the named isotope centers procured in 2024 (L05-036) reach routine operation around 2027-2029, so their consumables demand and localization pressure peak exactly in the 2030-2034 launch window.
ideas.demand_trigger_2030_2034: NAMED TRIGGER: the CNNC/China Isotope & Radiation centralized procurement cadence - follow-on cyclotron/isotope-center tenders after the 2024 three-center round (L05-036), under China's Medium-and-Long-Term Medical Isotope Development Plan (2021-2035; named policy, primary text to be fetched in P4 - not yet an atlas-verified citation). Parallel CN trigger: continued EtO-replacement/X-ray adoption in sterilization under ISO 11137-1:2025 (L05-042) served by CGN Dasheng-class capacity (L05-035) - the energy-limit change itself is PERMISSIVE; its trigger weight is contingent on the 2028 named-uprater evidence gate.
ideas.competition_outlook_2030: OEM in-house spares: IBA (L05-028 - identity-level; backlog claims unverified), L3-class, Varex internal targets (L05-033), CGN Dasheng in-house (L05-035); specialty merchant targetry houses (ARTMS/Comecer-class plus IBA's own target business) - PRE-PROMOTION BINDING P4 incumbency map for the cyclotron-target leg: if merchant targetry is already served, re-scope to the e-beam/X-ray window+converter leg where the merchant white space is more plausible; CNNC-ecosystem machine shops copying foil assemblies (domestic-substitution risk). The 'no merchant, certified, cross-platform supplier' claim is held as JUDGMENT pending that map. Startup wedge is the certified burst-statistics dossier + monitoring interlock + cross-platform qualification, none of which spares copies carry. Portfolio pre-agreement: G-02 joins the R2 beam-components portfolio evaluation (F-09/F-20, with C-09/D-07 adjacency) at P4 - at most one funded beam-components company.
ideas.timing_window_risk: Component-level pain is INFERRED from adjacent documented physics (L05-014) plus consumables logic - no atlas source yet documents window/target failure economics; this is the seed's honest gap and the 2028 co-development gate is binding. Access: consumables for SOE-adjacent buyers must be made in-country; foreign founder concedes manufacturing margin to a JV and holds qualification/monitoring IP - copying risk is real and priced (kill gate). Market size must be built bottom-up from fleet counts in P4; treat as a beachhead-sized wedge, not a large TAM claim.
ideas.commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034-12-31; interim kills: no operator/OEM co-development agreement by end-2028 -> stop; no paid qualification on an installed fleet by end-2030 -> fold to licensing the qualification/monitoring package.
ideas.extreme_edge: FLASH/UHDR-era interfaces - dose-rate regimes where even beam metrology is unresolved (L05-023, L05-024) and window thermal-shock margins become the machine-protection limit.
ideas.first_experiment: 2027-Q3: 60 kW-class beam-equivalent heat-flux test cell (scanned e-beam or calibrated surrogate flux) - foil window assembly surviving >=2,000 thermal cycles at 11 MeV-era flux with measured burst margin >=3x rated differential; Ta converter coupon thermal-cycling; rupture-detection interlock demonstrated <10 ms to isolation-valve trigger. VALIDITY LIMIT (declared): surrogate heat flux validates thermo-mechanics and interlock speed ONLY - it does NOT validate radiation-driven foil degradation (embrittlement, blistering); beam-time validation is bound into the 2028 co-development gate.
ideas.founder_fit_note: Low direct fit: titanium-foil exit windows and cooled conversion targets are thermo-mechanical/materials consumables, with founder skills applying mainly to the foil-health monitoring and interlock instrumentation.

ideas.concept: DC-conversion acceptance and commissioning instrumentation: a portable measurement island (swept-impedance bus-stability analyzer, IT-network insulation/ground-fault characterization, hot-swap/inrush transient capture) plus standardized acceptance protocols and signed dossiers, for facilities converting legacy UPS power rooms to 240V/336V/+-400V/800VDC and for vendors qualifying DC shelves - the measurement layer of the DC transition, not another in-path power product.
named_buyer_examples: US: OCP-member hyperscalers' commissioning chains (Google/Meta/Microsoft Mount Diablo - L02-044) and NVIDIA-ecosystem shelf/system vendors qualifying 800VDC hardware (L02-043, L02-046)
CN: Alibaba-lineage HVDC operators and their integrators - Delta China 'Panama' architecture (L02-048), Shenzhen Autrans supplying Alibaba datacenters and East-Data-West-Computing parks (L02-049)
CN: SOE telecom/colocation power-system procurement channels (China Mobile/Telecom HVDC collective-procurement cadence - named channel, P4 to evidence with an eligible primary source)
ideas.painful_job: The DC transition is architecturally unconverged - NVIDIA 800V-to-12V vs Google +-400V transitional approaches, with SiC voltage-rating, LLC resonant-conversion, and isolation design named as core unresolved hurdles in Chinese engineering coverage (L02-054, verified content) and multiple PSU architectures being standardized in parallel at OCP (L02-044). Every converted hall is therefore a systems-integration experiment: source/load impedance interactions, ungrounded-bus insulation behavior, and hot-swap transients have no site-acceptance test regime (IEC 62477-1 covers converter safety, not site acceptance - L02-112; the SST/IEC 60076 mismatch shows how slowly DC standards adapt - L02-036). China's installed base makes this a retrofit problem: the conversion-base case rests on verified deployment anchors (Delta/Alibaba 'Panama' 240VDC deployments in Zhejiang/Jiangsu - L02-048; Autrans supplying Alibaba datacenters and East-Data-West-Computing parks - L02-049; ongoing architecture churn - L02-054), so the 2030-2034 work is converting existing UPS halls, not just new builds. The circulated '~12% HVDC vs 78% UPS (~2021)' penetration figure is UNVERIFIED (not in the verified L02-048 record; raw-ledger WebSearch synthesis only) and is NOT load-bearing - P4 must re-source an eligible CN installed-base/penetration figure before final scoring.
ideas.product: An acceptance island: (1) GaN-based perturbation injector + analyzer measuring source/load impedance overlap and stability margins on live 240-800VDC buses; (2) insulation/ground-fault characterization and leakage mapping for unearthed (IT) DC networks; (3) high-fidelity transient capture for hot-swap/inrush/protection-coordination validation; (4) automated test sequences producing signed acceptance dossiers mapped to IEC 62477-1 (L02-112) and OCP/GB frameworks. Sold as instrument + per-project protocol license; the accumulated cross-vendor test-sequence library and stability-margin dataset is the compounding moat.
ideas.frontier_vision: The acceptance-and-evidence layer for all DC electrification - datacenter halls first, then 1500VDC (OCP roadmap - L02-044), DC industrial parks, EV megawatt charging plazas, and shipboard/microgrid DC - the 'commissioning authority in a flight case' for a world that is re-learning DC engineering.
ideas.precompany_plan_2026_2029: 2026-2027: method benchmarks published (impedance-criterion stability assessment on multi-vendor DC testbeds); OCP power-workstream participation; prototype injector/analyzer; decisive experiment ($300k, 2027-Q2). 2028: paid pilot audits - one US commissioning firm and one CN integrator via HK/CN licensed entity; begin cross-vendor sequence library. 2029: BINDING per-market gates, split - (US) no US frame agreement by end-2029 -> the US leg folds to niche lab tooling; (CN) no CN integrator frame agreement by end-2029 -> the CN leg downgrades to license-only with the honest flag change applied (F-06 precedent); plus P4 re-source of an eligible CN installed-base/penetration figure (the ~12%/78% figure is UNVERIFIED, not load-bearing) and evidence for the 8-12-year refresh-cycle inference; re-verify SOE procurement cadence.
ideas.launch_2030_timing_thesis: By 2030 the architecture war (800V vs +-400V vs legacy 240/336V) has produced a large heterogeneous installed base mid-conversion; acceptance instrumentation monetizes the heterogeneity itself, which persists precisely because standardization lags (L02-036, L02-112). Pre-2030 the market is too new (vendors self-certify their own first deployments); post-2034 OCP-standardized acceptance suites from instrument majors become the risk - hence the window and the kill gate.
ideas.demand_trigger_2030_2034: NAMED TRIGGERS: US - post-2027 scaling of NVIDIA's 800VDC Kyber/Rubin-Ultra production architecture (L02-043) and OCP Mount Diablo spec revisions (L02-044), each conversion/new hall requiring commissioning. CN - (a) refresh-cycle conversion of the legacy UPS-dominant installed base (verified deployment anchors L02-048/L02-049; the ~12%/78% penetration figure is UNVERIFIED and not load-bearing - P4 re-source of an eligible CN installed-base figure required; the 8-12-year power-system refresh cycle is labeled INFERENCE and must be evidenced in P4); (b) implementation programs under the April 2026 national AI-energy action plan, Guo-Neng-Fa-Ke-Ji [2026] No.34 (L14-036 - verified content only: high-efficiency cooling research areas and green-power direct connection; the trade-press '100% liquid-cooling mandate' is debunked and NOT relied on); (c) East-Data-West-Computing park expansion channels (L02-049). SOE telecom HVDC collective-procurement cadence named as channel, P4-verify.
ideas.competition_outlook_2030: Integrator self-certification (Delta - L02-048, Huawei-ecosystem, Autrans - L02-049); instrument majors (Keysight/Chroma/Hioki/Fluke) adding DC options without system-level acceptance protocols, and CN certification institutes (CQC/CEPREI-class) offering service-only testing - PRE-PROMOTION BINDING P4 competitor map covering both (instrument-major DC-acceptance roadmaps + CN institute service scope): the third-party-acceptance willingness thesis must survive it; Bender-class insulation-monitoring device vendors (devices, not commissioning toolchains); protection-product vendors bundling diagnostics (C-01-class units - which G-03 tests rather than competes with); component uncertainty in the CN chain (sole mainland NVIDIA-list supplier still without disclosed orders - L02-050) sustains third-party verification demand.
ideas.timing_window_risk: Datacenter-adjacency declared honestly: demand is deliberately anchored to retrofit/acceptance of the EXISTING installed base and per-project commissioning spend, not to incremental AI capex (the downturn-resistant slice, F-19 precedent); a total freeze of DC investment would still slow it - stated, not hidden. Core demand risk: operators may accept vendor self-certification instead of paying for third-party acceptance - the 2029 frame-agreement gate is binding. CN access: services/instrument sales via licensed entity; hardware is copyable, so the moat must be the validated methodology + sequence library + dossier credibility; margins on instrument plus per-project license; State-Grid-facing work is explicitly out of scope (commercial operators/integrators only), avoiding the F-06/C-12 domestic-only trap.
ideas.commercial_readiness_kill_date: 2034-12-31; per-market 2029 downgrade gates (split, binding): no US frame agreement by end-2029 -> US folds to niche lab tooling; no CN integrator frame agreement by end-2029 -> CN downgrades to license-only with honest flag change (F-06 precedent); interim kills: no US commissioning design-in AND no CN integrator frame agreement by end-2031 -> kill; OCP publishes a complete acceptance-test standard implemented by entrenched instrument majors before 2031 -> fold to niche lab tooling or license the sequence library.
ideas.extreme_edge: 1500VDC-class acceptance (OCP next step - L02-044) and MW-scale hot-swap transient physics, where no commercial instrument today produces admissible stability evidence.
ideas.first_experiment: 2027-Q2: GaN perturbation injector + analyzer prototype on a 100 kW 800VDC testbed with deliberately mis-tuned LLC stages - predict instability from measured source/load impedance overlap and validate prediction against observed bus oscillation across >=20 configurations; hot-swap transient capture fidelity benchmarked against reference instrumentation. Testbed assumption (declared): the 100 kW 800VDC testbed is loaner/partner hardware (OCP-member or integrator lab); the $300k budget covers injector/analyzer build and test time, not testbed ownership.
